name: Chewy Hermit Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening and brown sugar until fluffy.
2. Blend in the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Add the molasses and beat well.
4. Stir together the flour, cinnamon, baking soda, nutmeg, cloves, and salt.
5. Mix this dry ingredient mixture into the creamed ingredients, then beat well.
6. Stir in the raisins and chopped nuts.
7. Spread the batter evenly in a greased 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking pan.
8. Bake at 350°F for 25 to 30 minutes.
9. Cool slightly, then sift powdered sugar over the top.
10. Allow the bars to cool thoroughly before cutting into pieces.
Makes 32 bars.
